caption: The video appears to be captured by a security camera, labeled as "Cam 04," and shows a nighttime scene in what seems to be a garage or storage area. The timestamp indicates that the footage is from May 13, 2022, around 11:30 PM. In the first frame, a person is seen walking through the space, carrying an object that looks like a surfboard. The individual moves from the left side of the frame towards the right, passing by various items stored in the area, including a ladder and some hanging objects. As the person exits the frame, the second image shows the empty space with no visible movement, suggesting that the person has left the area. The lighting is dim, typical of night vision cameras, which illuminates the scene in grayscale. The overall environment appears organized but cluttered with various items.
